channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Kraken parent Payward closes $550 million Bitnomial deal, securing full CFTC derivatives stack
item.description: The deal gives Payward a full CFTC-regulated derivatives stack in the U.S.

item.title: Laywer pops up on Arbitrum DAO forums seeking funds for victims of decades-old North Korean terrorist acts
item.description: Families holding decades-old judgments against North Korea are trying to seize 30,765 ETH frozen after last month’s rsETH exploit, citing alleged links between the attack and DPRK-linked hacking groups such as Lazarus, and invoking a New Y…

item.title: Bitcoin stalls near $80,000. Stocks and ETF inflows still point to a breakout.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 4, 2026

item.title: Iran missile report sends bitcoin back to $79,000, with ETH, SOL, DOGE sharply lower
item.description: The largest crypto reversed sharply from a $80,594 high after Iran's Fars news agency claimed two missiles hit a U.S. warship, with oil spiking 5% before the U.S. denied the report.

item.title: BTC price can ‘easily’ hit $95K: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin gained fresh bullish BTC price targets after hitting new three-month highs above $80,000.

item.title: GameStop makes $55.5B offer to buy eBay in surprise takeover bid
item.description: GameStop proposes a $55.5 billion cash-and-stock takeover of eBay, disclosing a 5% stake and says CEO Ryan Cohen would lead the combined company.

item.title: Coinbase boosts Solana trading with DFlow integration
item.description: Coinbase adding DFlow as its primary router will mean eight times less trade failures.

item.title: Crypto bears got it wrong again, losing $300 million in liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin's move to $80,000 caught bears on the wrong side of the market again, leading to large short liquidations.

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Bitcoin drops below $78.3K, wiping out earlier gains after hitting $80K earlier today. $70M in long positions liquidated within an hour. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0yWVpMc1daUnZQY1F3Wl82SmxKZVR4STFmTUItMDIwRDFLTnhKdW42WVFrZHQ4NEk0WDQ5LXlhMmhzX1kzX1BreGlfeHdGOEEzcmI1SG8zaWZNd2JOYnlDUXcwYUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Bitcoin drops below $78…

item.title: Capital B raises $1.3M from Adam Back for Bitcoin strategy
item.description: The Blockstream CEO subscribed to 10 million warrants as Capital B pushes ahead with its Bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: US law firm attempts to block transfer of frozen ETH from Kelp exploit
item.description: Gerstein Harrow has filed similar cases in the past, arguing its clients have a claim to funds stolen by the DPRK and frozen by crypto firms.

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: BlackRock’s European Bitcoin ETP surpasses $1.1B in AUM, holding ~14,200 $BTC. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBkdURVZTlPcWdtWE9SaVhXdlNrWjJ3QlhUckxLRVB5WmlZdTBSdjREX2tMWElxcWpoT29FYTg0dGFqSDJJdk9HS1BuNnhpMHY4SmtOUkF4Q2lwZHZ0NXFoaHl2b20?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 UPDATE: BlackRock’s European…

item.title: Jobs data, earnings calls: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 4.

item.title: Recovery in bitcoin ETF inflows is real. It is just not complete yet.
item.description: While ETF inflows have resumed, the recovery has yet to match last fall’s peak.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs past $80K for the first time since January
item.description: Bitcoin soared as the MSCI AC Asia Index rose to a new high on Monday, an early indicator that investors viewed the weekend developments in a reasonably positive light.

item.title: CFTC sees mixed responses to prediction market rulemaking
item.description: The CFTC received more than 1,500 responses to its prediction market rulemaking proposal, with respondents divided on how it should police the platforms.

item.title: Strategy pauses bitcoin buys before Tuesday earnings
item.description: Michael Saylor says the company will resume purchases next week, but the pause lands as analysts focus on losses and the growing complexity of Strategy’s preferred-stock funding machine.

item.title: ‘Stablecoins’ are an outdated term from crypto’s early years: A16z
item.description: John Palmer, a developer and brand adviser, agreed, said it "feels like a bug" to call them stablecoins and that they should have a self-defined and non-reactionary name.

item.title: Veteran trader Peter Brandt sees bitcoin hitting $250,000, but only after a bottom later this year
item.description: Veteran trader Peter Brandt sees bitcoin rallying to $250,000 in 2029, but only after the market finishes a long drawn-out bottoming process that could last into September 2026.

item.title: XRP zooms above $1.40 on rising volume, putting focus on further breakout
item.description: Sharp volume surge drives move through $1.40, meaning traders may now watch whether the level holds as support.

item.title: Dogecoin jumps 4% to lead gains among majors as bitcoin zooms higher
item.description: Sharp volume spike drives breakout through resistance, with price now testing whether the level flips to support.

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $80,000 as flows build, but traders hedge and doubt a breakout
item.description: Strong ETF inflows and rising leverage are lifting prices, yet CryptoQuant data shows weak spot demand and Polymarket odds put just a 23% chance on $90,000 this month.

item.title: Stablecoin firms have a $112B additional opportunity in LATAM remittance
item.description: The US-to-Mexico remittance corridor, while still the largest, shrank 4.5% in 2025 as other Latin American corridors grew.

item.title: JUST IN: $150,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1iSW5FOHk1RlRqa3FlTDFqV1d0R3Jzdm4tdFI2Q2k4QjFHa1N4M0RMMlZiSW9icU9OcnZrMFJGbUNQQjhRMEtQcU0wZEsycnNxQ1Y3Mi1ldUFzNXFLeHVWc0Zn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $150,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: BREAKING: $80,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: BREAKING: $80,000 Bitcoin

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin rises above $80,000 for the first time since January 31st. - x.com

item.title: Morgan Stanley's Oldenburg: Bitcoin on U.S. bank balance sheets is coming, just not yet
item.description: Morgan Stanley launched the first bank-issued Bitcoin ETP, but Amy Oldenburg said advisors, regulators and balance sheets still have a long way to go.

item.title: 🚨WARREN BUFFETT WARNS ON CRYPTO SPECULATION Buffett says markets are increasingly driven by short-term bets, with behavior “closer to gambling” as retail investors chase quick gains. He pointed to Bitcoin, memecoins, and prediction markets as k - x.com

item.title: Has Bitcoin $BTC bottomed? Well, this is perhaps the most respected technical line in Bitcoin’s history. For nearly ten years, this ascending trendline has acted as the launchpad. Every touch has historically preceded a massive expansion: • 2017: +968% • 201 - x.com

item.title: 🚨LTC CREATOR: "JUST BUY BITCOIN AND KEEP IT" Litecoin Creator Charlie Lee says he regrets creating $LTC and urged investors to simply buy $BTC and hold it. - x.com

item.title: Strategy takes Bitcoin buying breather ahead of Q1 earnings report
item.description: Michael Saylor signaled a “pause” on BTC buying ahead of Tuesday’s earnings report, with Wall Street expecting a loss for Q1.

item.title: Once Bitcoin stabilizes over $80,000, many people on the sidelines are going to start questioning the 4-year cycle and whether the low is already in. Plenty will begin to buy back in, driving the price closer to $90,000, and then a reflexive surge takes us back to - x.com

item.title: How Canton Network Lets Institutions Guard Against DeFi Security Risks: Digital Asset CEO
item.description: Because Canton allows participants to implement guardrails, Digital Asset's Yuval Rooz said institutions can protect against bad actors.

item.title: 🚨 INSIGHT: Bitcoin miners are on track to earn more from AI than from Bitcoin by end of 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1adHZETDdXTy1SanpmX2dFcm1YUkNHUFhIOUFhZGxLZ1VKXzQwR2ZnRi0wT3RBQlcyNU41M21JbkRONnVNM1B2aDV4cnZ3bEtFNTRHdmMyVXoyaFd0ZXpYOURZbTc?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 INSIGHT: Bitcoin miners are …

item.title: You Installed Hermes. Now Make It Look Better Than ChatGPT or Claude
item.description: The terminal is fine. But if you actually want to live in your Hermes agent, here are the four best GUIs the community has built—and how to run them.

item.title: Policy Summit and other things at Consensus 2026: State of Crypto
item.description: We are kicking off the show in Miami this week. Here's what you should attend.

item.title: Bitcoin preps highest weekly close since January as BTC price nears $79K
item.description: Bitcoin canceled out the week's earlier losses to tease the highest weekly BTC price candle close since the end of January near $79,000.

item.title: Crypto is at bottom of U.S. voters' priorities heading into elections, CoinDesk survey shows
item.description: Americans had a generally unfavorable view of cryptocurrencies, the survey of 1,000 randomly selected registered voters found.

item.title: Americans still prefer banks over crypto for financial access, CoinDesk's survey shows
item.description: New polling of voters suggests they aren't yet warming much to crypto, tending to see it as a negative force in the economy, and they have similar distrust of AI.

item.title: U.S. voters don't trust Trump administration to oversee crypto sector, CoinDesk poll finds
item.description: The new poll suggests the vast majority of people think that government officials should keep their own financial interests separate from the industry.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Mike Cagney’s second act: Turning blockchain into Wall Street’s new plumbing
item.description: Figure’s $1 billion month capped a years-long push to strip out middlemen from credit markets, bringing real-world assets, lending and even equities onchain.

item.title: Americans distrust crypto, AI as industry super PACs flood midterms, poll finds
item.description: A new Politico poll finds most Americans distrust crypto and AI, raising questions about whether candidates backed by industry super PACs could face voter backlash.

item.title: Binance founder CZ said: "AI will make you jobless.'' ''Crypto will make you not need a job." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBXNWNneFMzYWVqWGtGMFRCcnZGZ21QOWRZVWNGeDlIWDhOd1pHQ2lmMjdPWEd3SEQtMl9qZHhXMjNhbnJtMFU1XzJwbm5nMUtVUlU3SDZOSXU1RWpma3BMNmFR?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance founder CZ said: "AI will …

item.title: Iran’s largest crypto exchange founded by sons of family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
item.description: Nobitex, Iran’s largest crypto exchange, was founded by brothers linked to the powerful Kharrazi family, which has ties to the country’s supreme leaders.

item.title: US CISA adds ‘insane’ Linux Copy Fail flaw to watch list
item.description: Malicious actors with code execution capability may gain root access on Linux systems using as few as 10 lines of Python, according to a researcher.

item.title: CLARITY ACT IS COMING 🚀 Coinbase says a deal has been reached on a key part of the U.S. crypto market bill. A major hurdle is cleared and the legislation could now move to a Senate vote. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE52a2xHU0U1RDBNeEU1Z1JvZDZ0MTlfRG1tdmpTa1N1eHZ3NHczYzRwX1B1NVRGY0dTSnVhSHM1cFRFUmM2dlZ2c0t5YnBCTkJINTdwcGFCMU5TaUh4alVBMzBn?oc=5" target="_blank">CLARITY ACT IS COMING 🚀 Coinbase …

item.title: New York forces Uphold to pay $5M over fraudulent crypto investment scheme
item.description: New York AG Letitia James secured a $5 million settlement from Uphold for promoting CredEarn, a crypto savings product that misled users about its risks.

item.title: I will now start blocking crypto trenchers in my replies. What they do is simple: they jump on any term, codename, or meme they think might trend, instantly spin up a crypto coin around it, and then get angry when it doesn’t take off. They have absolutely no inter - x.com

item.title: Crypto industry will be ‘just fine’ if CLARITY Act doesn’t pass: Chris Perkins
item.description: The efforts of the SEC and CFTC chairs indicate that the crypto industry will not suffer without the CLARITY Act, according to crypto executive Chris Perkins.

item.title: Bitcoin logs best monthly performance in 12 months during April
item.description: Despite being the best-performing month in the past 12 months, Bitcoin still came in slightly below its historical average, according to CoinGlass data.

item.title: Wallets seized by OFAC may not be Iranian; other state actors instead: Analyst
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that wallets the US targeted as part of Operation Economic Fury were linked to Tehran, but analysis of the wallets' characteristics suggests otherwise.

item.title: OpenAI GPT Image 2 vs Google Nano Banana 2: Which AI Image Generator Is Best?
item.description: Which state-of-the-art AI image generator is most effective at producing A+ results? We put GPT Image 2 and Nano Banana 2 to the test.

item.title: Oscars Ban AI Performances and Screenplays From Eligibility
item.description: New rules require human actors and writers for Oscar consideration.

item.title: 🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's central bank bans stablecoin and crypto settlement in cross-border payments, effective October 1. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBySkdxbmw5MUFPalpmN0JyNmZVQU5rRTRtTHFlR0hvdXVDY180YnZYQWw1eHdydGkydzdwUEVrQThENVlPaEw3WkRzdWR2QVRUTzB4ZFRZTHNTM1hlMkE?oc=5" target="_blank">🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's central bank bans…

item.title: Brazil's central bank bans stablecoin and crypto settlement in cross-border payments
item.description: The ban applies to fintechs and payment firms, closing the back-end payment rail for cross-border flows, but individual crypto investors can still buy and hold assets.

item.title: A fact I feel like almost nobody knows: Ethereum's gas limit will be increased to ~200M after Glamsterdam, a huge increase from the 60M we have today. That’s a 3x+ of L1 execution capacity, with expectation of further doubling soons after that. Assuming no si - x.com
